title: Scope of TÜBİTAK ULAKBİM + WILEY Read & Publish Agreement
content:
Scope of TÜBİTAK ULAKBİM + WILEY Read & Publish Agreement

Scope of TÜBİTAK ULAKBİM + WILEY Read & Publish Agreement

Workshop run by Fabio DiBello/Mickaël Roullier

You are invited to our Webinar on Open Access Publishing and the TÜBITAK ULAKBIM/Wiley Agreement Learn about open access and how you can benefit from this groundbreaking agreement! There are two dates to choose from, so sign up for one of them. Please use the drop-down box on the registration page to choose dates that work for you. All times are given in local time (Istanbul time)

The webinar is available in English. Registration is required to access the replay and

receive a certificate of attendance. Duration 45-60 minutes.
